w:r.w:t: Primary: Black (#000000) and Gold (#C9A84C) throughout. Background: Black. Text: White/Light Grey on dark sections. Accent: Gold for headings, borders and highlights. The website should feel premium, bold and modern — consistent with the Game2Grow brand identity.

Two primary audiences: (1) Corporate HR Leaders, L&D Managers and CHROs looking for team training solutions. (2) College Management, Principals and Placement Officers looking for student and faculty development programs.
Premium. Bold. Confident. Every page should have a clear Call to Action — either "Book a Session" or "Get in Touch". The website should speak to outcomes, not features.
The following logo files will be provided separately:

Game2Grow is a Pan India gamified learning and talent development company that transforms how individuals and organizations build skills — through carefully designed game-based simulations and experiential methodologies. Founded by Anjen Fernando, a certified Professional Trainer in Experiential Learning (IIPE, Canada), Game2Grow delivers high-impact learning experiences for students, working professionals, faculty and corporates across India. We don't teach through slides. We don't train through lectures. We build skills through play — because people learn best by doing, not by listening.
"To empower students, professionals and organizations to perform at the peak of their potential — through the power of play."
"To provide gamified, simulation-based learning experiences that transform individuals into confident, capable leaders and teams."
Game2Grow offers 4 core service categories. Each should have its own dedicated page or section on the website.
Your Team Has the Skills. Does It Have the Edge?

Game2Grow designs customised gamified Power Sessions for corporate teams — addressing specific team challenges through immersive simulations. No slides. No lectures. Just high-impact experiences that create visible change in 3 to 5 hours.
One focused skill — high energy, immediate impact
Deeper transformation — team dynamics or leadership
Long-term culture building and team development
The Winning Unit — Building High-Performance Teams
The Alliance — Creating a Collaboration Culture
The Peace Table — Workplace Harmony & Conflict Resolution
The Trust Factor — Building Trust in Teams
The Change Maker — Leading Change with Confidence
Own the Room — Executive Presence & Presentation
The Honest Game — Building a Feedback Culture
The Impossible Box — Creative Problem Solving
The Next Move — Sharp Decision Making
Pressure to Power — Stress to Strength
The Founder's Chair — The Ownership Edge
The Leadership Game — Leaders Who Inspire
The Coach Within — The Coaching Manager
No Excuses — A Culture of Accountability
The Real World — Campus to Corporate
The Stickiness Factor — Retention through Engagement
The Closer — Sales Confidence & Closing Power
The Deal Table — The Art of Negotiation
Two flagship programs for students — Arts and Engineering:
A gamified placement readiness program for MBA and final year students
A gamified accelerator that rewires how students think, lead and perform
Covers: Leadership, Communication, Corporate Etiquette, HR Dynamics, Personal Branding
Covers: Industry Awareness, Ownership, Creative Thinking, Team Essentials, Career Blueprint
Program Name: The Crucial Play — Between Admission and Placement
For: Faculty, Professors, Lecturers and HODs

A one-day power-packed workshop that trains faculty on process — not just subject knowledge. Helps faculty understand their role in the complete student journey from admission to placement, through gamified simulations and experiential exercises.
The Production Blueprint — Faculty as process owners
The Engaged Classroom — Making learning stick
Mentoring vs Teaching — From teacher to mentor
The Placement Mindset — Embed employability in every class
Process Over Passion — Own the institutional process
Your Career. Your Blueprint. Our Game.
One-on-one career counselling and mentoring for students and working professionals — helping them make informed career decisions and build personalised development plans.
The following projects should be featured in the Portfolio section:
Faculty Development Program + Student Industry Readiness Program
The Crucial Play (Faculty FDP) + Game Changer (Students)
Faculty members + Final year MBA students
Highly rated by both faculty and students — multiple Excellent ratings in feedback
Dr. Manju, Placement Director — Both FDP and student sessions were exceptional
Ms. S. Vaishnavi, Assistant Professor — Experiential approach made every concept stick
M, MBA Student — Truly eye-opening session
Visible transformation in employees — deep engagement throughout

game-oriented training for our employees was truly powerful — the transformation was visible. Unlike conventional PPT-based sessions, the game approach kept everyone deeply engaged and they thoroughly enjoyed every moment of it." — Dr.
YouTube Links (to be embedded on website):
Anjen presenting to a large student audience
Participants in cowboy hats — role-play simulation
Card game simulation at round table
Currently one team member — the Founder:
15+ years of experience in Training & Talent Development
Certified Professional Trainer in Experiential Learning — IIPE, Canada
Pride of Coimbatore Leadership & Excellence Award — Trio Thought Solutions
Featured guest on Yardstick Academy Podcast — 3-Part Series
Photo to use: Professional photo of Anjen Fernando (provided separately — podcast sitting photo)
4 testimonials to feature on the website:

game-oriented training for our employees was truly powerful — the transformation was visible. Unlike conventional PPT-based sessions, the game approach kept everyone deeply engaged and they thoroughly enjoyed every moment of it."

"Anjen conducted both the FDP session for our faculty and the industry readiness program for our students — and both were exceptional. The game-based approach kept everyone engaged, and the transformation was clearly visible across the board."
"This session gave us a completely new insight into mentoring and guiding students. The experiential approach made every concept stick — highly impactful!"
"The session was truly eye-opening. It shaped my perspective on professional conduct and organizational ethics in a way no classroom ever did."
Separate enquiry forms for: (a) Corporate Training and (b) College / Institution Programs
Fields: Name, Organisation, Designation, Mobile, Email, Type of Program Interested In, Message
Include a "Book a Free Demo" button prominently on the contact page
Google Maps embed showing Coimbatore location
Yardstick Academy Podcast (3 videos to embed)
Note: Instagram and YouTube channel for Game2Grow are planned. Please add social media icon placeholders in the footer. Links to be updated once channels are live.
Note: Please embed all 3 YouTube videos in a dedicated "Watch Anjen in Action" section on the About or Founder page.
Hero banner, tagline, 4 service highlights, testimonial strip, CTA
Company story, Vision & Mission, Why Game2Grow, Founder profile
All 24 programs listed, formats, outcomes, testimonial from Dr.
RVSCAS + Yardstick Digital case studies with photos
All training photos in a clean grid layout
Articles on gamified learning (to be added later)
Dual enquiry forms + Google Maps + social links
This is the exact color treatment to use everywhere on the website
• All page titles that mention the brand name
• Meta title and browser tab title
"Why Gamified Learning?" — A dedicated section explaining Game2Grow's methodology vs traditional training (No slides. No lectures. 100% Experience.)
"The Program Library" — A searchable/filterable list of all 24 corporate programs + 3 institutional programs
"Watch Anjen in Action" — Embed all 3 Yardstick Academy Podcast videos
"Book a Free Demo" — A prominent CTA button on every page that opens an enquiry form
"Humanoid & AI Age" — A short section on why gamified human skills are irreplaceable in the age of AI and humanoids
"Gamified simulations that prepare you for the real world"
"In the age of AI and Humanoids — the only irreplaceable advantage is a human who truly knows how to think, lead and perform. Game2Grow builds that human."
Quick Links: Home | About | Corporate Training | Student Programs | Faculty Development | Contact
Copyright line: © 2024 Game2Grow. All Rights Reserved.
1. Color theme: Black and Gold throughout — no blue, no generic corporate colors
2. Every page must have a clear CTA — "Book a Session" or "Get in Touch"
3. Mobile responsive — most visitors will come from WhatsApp links on mobile
4. Fast loading — compress all training photos before uploading
5. Premium feel — think Rolex, Apple — minimal, bold, confident
6. The website speaks to TWO audiences — Corporate HR and College Management — design accordingly
